title: Terrberry
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Terrberries''' were berries native to [[Parein II 4/Legends|Parein II 4]]. It was used, along with [[Parein Sweetgreen Fruit]] and [[spicy nut]]s to make an alcoholic beverage known as [[daranu]].

{{Food-stub}}
